name: katalon-ollama-tool
description: Web tool: test steps → Katalon Groovy via local Ollama

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
